meanings.definition: the dispersion of fungicides or insecticides or fertilizer on growing crops (often from a low-flying aircraft)
a quantity of small objects flying through the air
the application of a liquid in the form of small particles ejected from a sprayer
be discharged in sprays of liquid
examples: Water sprayed all over the floor

meanings.definition: scatter in a mass or jet of droplets
cover by spraying with a liquid
